chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-711 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 13.02.2025 M/s Muhammad Sulleman Unar and Asad Ali Jatoi, advocates for petitioner Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri Assistant A.G Sindh a/w Deputy Administrator Zakat Hyderabad Division (Muhammad Zeeshan Lashari) *** Case of the petitioner, per contents of the petition, is that he was appointed as Audit Officer (BS-16) on contract basis by the respondents; however, not being regularized despite his continuous service to date. Counsel for the petitioner in support of his case has submitted photocopy of Judgment dated 21.11.2012 passed by the Hon’ble Supreme Court in S.M.C No.15 of 2010 & other connected matters and placed reliance thereon. Deputy Administrator Zakat Hyderabad Division present has admitted the continuous service of petitioner till date. Whereas, the learned Assistant A.G submits that in the case, referred to above, the Hon’ble Supreme Court has left the matter of regularization upto Department(s) for consideration in accordance with law, therefore, the present case may also be sent to Department concerned for taking decision in accordance with law. Learned counsel for the petitioner concedes such proposal and seeks disposal of the petition. In view of the above, instant petition stands disposed of with directions to respondent No.1 to examine the case of petitioner and then pass speaking Order within 90 days from the date of this Order strictly in accordance with law and after affording full opportunity of hearing to petitioner. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
